name: Telomerase Restoration field change check for June 10, 2026

scope.question: What changed for Telomerase Restoration since the 2026-05-31 public baseline publication, and does any change justify a public update?

summary: Ran the first Telomerase Restoration field change check from the 2026-05-31T15:14:40.874Z public baseline publication through June 10, 2026. The known Libella AAV-hTERT aging registry remains unknown status, last known recruiting, estimated complete in January 2021, and has no posted results. ClinicalTrials.gov found no TA-65, TA-65MD, AAV-hTERT, or hTERT aging registry with a same-window update. PubMed found no same-window TA-65, AAV-hTERT, TAT2, cycloastragenol, telomerase mRNA, correction, retraction, or expression-of-concern record that changes the public outlook. Broader same-window telomere/telomerase hits were observational, disease-mechanism, animal ecology, review, or wrong-scope biomarker context. No public source, study, finding, activity item, outlook, or candidate bundle is warranted. However, the pass identified important pre-baseline source-completeness gaps: a 2025 TA-65 systematic review/meta-analysis, several TA-65 no-results registry records, and telomerase mRNA boundary context. A coverage assessment was created and recommends coverage repair before ordinary surveillance resumes.

materiality_decision.rationale: The same-window delta does not change stage, momentum, read firmness, safety framing, or public evidence support. The material finding is internal source-completeness risk: recent review/meta-analysis and active registry coverage for TA-65 and telomerase-based modalities is thin, so the next pass should be coverage repair rather than publication.

search_log.summary: The audit found one registry-linked interventional study for the track, with trial_details present but no local registry check date. The watch item is the Libella AAV-hTERT aging phase 1 registry, locally marked unknown status and no posted results.

Current registry version still has UNKNOWN overall status, last known status RECRUITING, estimated primary and study completion in 2021-01, last update posted 2019-12-10, estimated enrollment of five, and no posted results.

Found NCT04133649 for aging plus Libella disease-context AAV-hTERT studies NCT04110964 and NCT04133454. All three are unknown status and have no posted results; only NCT04133649 maps directly to the aging track.

search_log.query: TA-65 OR TA-65MD OR telomerase activator
search_log.summary: Found older or no-results TA-65 registry records including NCT02766790, NCT01753674, NCT02531334, NCT02530255, and NCT05598359. None has posted results. NCT05598359 is not yet recruiting, last updated 2026-05-01, and predates the delta window.

search_log.query: TA-65 OR TA-65MD OR AAV-hTERT OR hTERT aging, filtered to registry last updates 2026-05-31 through 2026-06-10
search_log.summary: Returned no same-window registry records. No TA-65, TA-65MD, AAV-hTERT, or hTERT aging registry status or results update was found in the surveillance window.

search_log.query: telomerase, hTERT, TA-65, telomerase activator, AAV-hTERT, or telomere length terms with aging, ageing, older, senescence, healthspan, or longevity; publication dates 2026-05-31 through 2026-06-10
search_log.summary: Returned 24 broad records. Titles screened as animal ecology, social/observational telomere biology, disease mechanisms, biomarker association, aging-biomarker review, or wrong-scope hTERT context. None was a telomerase-restoration intervention result.

search_log.query: telomerase mRNA, hTERT mRNA, AAV-hTERT, TA-65, TAT2, or cycloastragenol; publication dates 2026-05-31 through 2026-06-10
search_log.summary: Returned zero records in the exact delta window.

search_log.query: Baseline support PMIDs 21113150, 22585399, 21426483, 26950204, 20822369, 37086366, 18981163, and 40789040 with retraction, erratum, corrected-and-republished, or expression-of-concern publication types
search_log.summary: Returned zero correction, retraction, erratum, corrected-and-republished, or expression-of-concern records for the baseline PubMed source set.

search_log.source_name: PubMed and web lead screen for pre-baseline coverage gaps
search_log.query: TA-65 systematic review meta-analysis, telomerase mRNA therapy, Astragalus telomere review, VITAL telomere length, and Libella AAV-hTERT results
search_log.summary: Found pre-baseline but relevant context that should be handled by coverage repair rather than same-window surveillance: PMID 41286474 TA-65 systematic review/meta-analysis, PMID 40958415 telomerase mRNA human skin radiation-injury paper, PMID 41002620 Astragalus vascular-aging review, and PMID 40409468 VITAL vitamin D telomere-length RCT.

trial_watch_checks.summary: The Libella AAV-hTERT aging phase 1 registry remains unchanged in interpretation: unknown status, last known recruiting, no posted results, five planned participants, and estimated completion in January 2021.

excluded_sources.title: Effects of TA-65 on telomere length, functional outcomes, and inflammation: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
excluded_sources.reason: Directly relevant TA-65 review/meta-analysis, but it was published before the May 31 baseline. It should be staged, reviewed, and interpreted in a coverage-repair bundle rather than added during same-window surveillance.

excluded_sources.title: Telomerase mRNA therapy protects human skin against radiation-induced DNA damage.
excluded_sources.reason: Pre-baseline primary source using TERT mRNA in human skin cells and tissues for radiation injury; the abstract reports no telomere-length extension during the experiment. It is telomerase-based therapeutic context, not same-window aging or telomere-restoration evidence.

excluded_sources.title: Targeting Telomere Shortening in Vascular Aging and Atherosclerosis: Therapeutic Promise of Astragalus membranaceus.
excluded_sources.reason: Pre-baseline review of Astragalus-derived compounds and vascular aging. It may help future TA-65/cycloastragenol boundary coverage but does not represent a same-window result.

excluded_sources.title: Vitamin D3 and marine omega-3 fatty acids supplementation and leukocyte telomere length: 4-year findings from the VITAL randomized controlled trial.
excluded_sources.reason: Pre-baseline human RCT with leukocyte telomere-length attrition as an endpoint. It is not telomerase restoration or a telomerase-directed intervention.

excluded_sources.title: Effect of TA-65MD on Healthy Volunteers
excluded_sources.reason: Historical TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry, unknown status, last known recruiting, estimated completion in 2017, no posted results. It is relevant to future coverage repair but unchanged in the delta window.

excluded_sources.title: The Effects of the Telomerase Activator TA-65 on Insulin Resistance, Inflammation, and Metabolic Syndrome
excluded_sources.reason: Historical terminated metabolic-syndrome TA-65 registry with actual enrollment of 13 and no posted results. It is pre-baseline limiting registry context.

excluded_sources.title: Effects of TA-65, a Telomerase Activator on Metabolic Syndrome
excluded_sources.reason: Historical completed TA-65 metabolic-syndrome registry with no posted results. It should be considered during coverage repair, not same-window surveillance.

excluded_sources.title: Telomerase Activator and Retinal Amyloid
excluded_sources.reason: Historical completed TA-65 registry with no posted results and disease/retinal endpoint context. It is not a same-window public update.

excluded_sources.title: TA-65 and Aging Associated Microvascular Dysfunction
excluded_sources.reason: Relevant TA-65 microvascular dysfunction study, but it is not yet recruiting, has no posted results, and was last updated on 2026-05-01 before the baseline publication.

excluded_sources.title: Evaluation of Safety and Tolerability of Libella Gene Therapy for Critical Limb Ischemia: AAV-hTERT
excluded_sources.reason: Disease-context Libella AAV-hTERT registry with unknown status and no posted results. It may inform gene-therapy boundary review but is not an aging-track result.

excluded_sources.title: Evaluation of Safety and Tolerability of Libella Gene Therapy for Alzheimer's Disease: AAV-hTERT
excluded_sources.reason: Disease-context Libella AAV-hTERT registry with unknown status and no posted results. It may inform disease-boundary review but does not change the Telomerase Restoration aging outlook.

excluded_sources.title: Preliminary effects of a modified Otago Exercise Program on metabolic, cellular, and epigenetic biomarkers in people living with dementia: A pilot randomized controlled trial.
excluded_sources.reason: Same-window pilot exercise program with cellular/epigenetic biomarker framing, not telomerase restoration or telomerase-directed intervention evidence.

excluded_sources.title: Fetuin-A correlates negatively with leukocyte telomere length and human telomerase in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
excluded_sources.reason: Same-window observational acute myocardial infarction biomarker association, not an intervention or telomerase-restoration result.

excluded_sources.title: Silica-induced telomere dysfunction promotes pulmonary fibrosis through the activation of the cGAS-STING pathway.
excluded_sources.reason: Same-window toxic-injury disease-mechanism paper around telomere dysfunction, not telomerase restoration.

excluded_sources.title: Telomere Length and Cognitive Function Among Middle-Aged and Older Participants From Communities Underrepresented in Aging Research: A Preliminary Study.
excluded_sources.reason: Same-window observational telomere-length and cognitive-function study, not telomerase activation or restoration evidence.

excluded_sources.title: Aging Biomarkers in Osteoporosis: A Systematic Review of Molecular Mechanisms, Biological Aging, and Population Evidence.
excluded_sources.reason: Same-window review of biomarkers in osteoporosis with broad telomere-length context. It is not track-specific intervention evidence.

notes: Triage selected Telomerase Restoration as the rank-1 surveillance item after DNA Repair Enhancement returned to recent ordinary surveillance.
The delta window is anchored to publication event publish-telomerase-restoration-bootstrap-2026-05-31-2026-05-31t15-14-40-874z.
No public bundle was created because the same-window evidence did not alter the current human_biomarker_signal, mixed-momentum, tentative public read.
The absence of a prior coverage assessment, together with the pre-baseline TA-65 meta-analysis and registry gaps, makes coverage repair the appropriate next mode.
next_actions: Run coverage repair for Telomerase Restoration before ordinary surveillance resumes, with emphasis on PMID 41286474, TA-65 registry coverage, telomerase mRNA boundary context, and Libella AAV-hTERT disease-boundary registries.
If coverage repair stages public records, require at least source-fidelity and interpretation/forecast review; add safety-limitations if the TA-65 or gene-therapy safety framing changes.
Continue watching NCT04133649 for posted results, status changes, linked publications, or safety disclosures.
